# LiquidGlass Study Quests

Read `AGENTS.md` first, then `docs/README.md`. The `docs/` folder is the project memory.

Core rules:

- Use TypeScript strictly.
- Keep the app installable and offline-capable.
- Keep task data local-first in IndexedDB.
- Use LiquidGlass visuals with accessible contrast.
- Keep 3D progressive, responsive, optional, and behind readable UI.
- Never send full task content to the push API.
- Update docs when behavior, setup, architecture, or privacy rules change.
